name: rule id namespacing: rule in _community/<plugin-id>/ must use `<plugin-id>/<rule-id>` namespaced form (forward-slash delimiter)
command:
mkdir -p tree/_community/acme && echo 'maintainer: a@b.c
license: MIT' > tree/_community/acme/README.md && printf 'source:
  id: a
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: https://acme.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-wrong, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: [g-wrong]
all_set: [g-wrong]
' > tree/_community/acme/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing
